steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$3x + y = 21$$ and $$9x - y = 3$$. This gives $\frac{9}{3}=3$ but $\frac{-1}{1}=-1$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The $x$ and $y$ coefficient ratios differ, so the lines intersect once — exactly one solution. That matches choice D — D is correct.
